narration.label: Intro
narration.text: Walk through the features with us — from the morning kiosk to the admin tools that run the building.

narration.label: Kiosk
narration.text: By first period, students are scanning in at the kiosk.

narration.label: ID cards
narration.text: The office already printed ID cards — students tap the same badge every day.

narration.label: Themes
narration.text: An admin creates the card theme once — colors and gradients — and every student ID matches.

narration.label: Prizes
narration.text: At lunch, someone cashes points for a prize they picked last week.

narration.label: Coupons
narration.text: A teacher prints a coupon for kindness caught in the hallway.

narration.label: Raffle
narration.text: Friday assembly — raffle drums roll — tickets from all week.

narration.label: Houses
narration.text: House points tick up after the pep rally challenge.

narration.label: Hall of Fame
narration.text: The Hall of Fame slide rotates new names at dismissal.

narration.label: Notifications
narration.text: Meanwhile, notifications flag a low prize shelf before Monday.

narration.label: Bulletin
narration.text: The bulletin board tells tomorrow’s spirit theme.

narration.label: Library
narration.text: Library returns earn a quiet bonus point before bus call.

narration.label: Badges
narration.text: A badge unlocks for the reader who finished the series.

narration.label: Analytics
narration.text: After buses leave, admin scans insights before heading home.

narration.label: Attendance
narration.text: Attendance records from the kiosk are already in sync.

narration.label: Outro
narration.text: One day, one thread — LevelUp ties the moments together so motivation does not reset at 3 p.m.
